text:
Created attachment 204985
shar(1) archive of Cannonball Ports script.

Cannonball is a program which allows you to play an enhanced version of Yu Suzuki's seminal arcade racer, OutRun, on a variety of systems.

---

QA:
- portlint -AC
- poudriere - 11.2 / 12.0 / 13-CURRENT (both i386/amd64 for all)
- Manually tested on - 12.0-RELEASE-p5

---

It would be nice if this port can be a new addition to the emulators category.
